title: Flea Treatment in Inwood, Long Island | $350 - $650
metaDescription: Professional flea treatment services in Inwood, Long Island. Fast, effective flea extermination for homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call today for $350 - $650 service!
intro: Dealing with a flea infestation in Inwood requires immediate professional intervention to protect your family and pets. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive flea treatment services throughout Inwood, Long Island, using proven methods that eliminate fleas at all life stages. Our experienced technicians understand the unique challenges of flea control in this residential community and deliver fast, effective solutions.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has been serving Inwood and surrounding Long Island communities for years with reliable, affordable flea extermination services. Our licensed technicians use pet-safe, EPA-approved treatments and offer same-day service to quickly restore comfort to your home.
localContext: Inwood's mix of single-family homes, apartments, and proximity to parks creates an environment where fleas can easily spread from outdoor areas into residences. Whether you live near Inwood Country Club or in one of the neighborhood's charming residential streets, our team knows the local pest patterns and provides targeted flea treatments that work.

faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in Inwood?
faqs.answer: Our flea treatment services in Inwood range from $350 to $650, depending on the size of your property and the severity of the infestation. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any treatment so you know exactly what to expect.

faqs.question: How quickly can you treat my flea problem in Inwood?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day flea treatment services in Inwood for urgent cases. Most treatments take 1-2 hours to complete, and you'll notice a significant reduction in flea activity within 24-48 hours. Follow-up treatments may be recommended for severe infestations.

faqs.question: Are your flea treatments safe for pets and children?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved, pet-safe flea treatment products that are highly effective yet safe for your family and animals. We recommend keeping pets and children away from treated areas for 2-4 hours after application, then they can safely return once surfaces are dry.

faqs.question: Do you guarantee your flea treatment services in Inwood?
faqs.answer: Yes, we stand behind our work with a satisfaction guarantee. If fleas return within 30 days of treatment, we'll come back and retreat your property at no additional charge. We also provide guidance on preventing future infestations to ensure long-term results.
